---
title: Yellow Dog
author: Martin Amis
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★
rating: 1
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Yellow Dog
Trash book, couldnt even finish… Fountainhead vibes

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Abandoned
